content.en:
Ye Tian stared at the root of this forbidden divine tree, and his heart was also very excited.

Ouyang Jiu'er was frightened by Ye Tian's eyes, and hurriedly said, "Brother Ye, you have already mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, you won't still want to rob me of this Forbidden Divine Tree root!"

"Of course I won't rob it!"

Ye Tian said with white eyes.

Even if he was moved by this forbidden divine tree root, he would not do such a shameless thing.

If he really dared to snatch it, he estimated that Ouyang Jiu'er would fight with him.

However, if he encounters an extra forbidden divine tree torso, he will definitely snatch it at all costs, after all, this thing can make people master the power of dark and taboo, and it will also be useful to his wife!

Suddenly.

Ye Tian thought of the hall master of the Forbidden Palace, the other party also mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, could it be different from the way he mastered the power of the Dark Tabo, but obtained the fragment of the torso of the Forbidden Divine Tree, and only after refining did he master the power of the Dark Taboo?

This possibility is not impossible!

"If the Forbidden Hall Master really has a fragment of the Forbidden Divine Tree's torso in his hand, then you can borrow it from him in the future!" Ye Tian thought.

"This thing is a real treasure too!"

Ouyang Jiu'er pointed to a piece of scale and said.

"What is this?" Ye Tian couldn't recognize the origin of this scale, but it also contained the power of darkness and taboo.

"This is the hardest scale of a Dark Forbidden Domain creature!" Ouyang Jiu'er said, "Any Dark Forbidden Creature has a strength comparable to that of a Domain Ancestor, but Dark Forbidden Creature is very rare, and they hardly enter the realm, so few people know about Dark Forbidden Creatures. "

"A dark forbidden creature comparable to the Domain Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

What kind of luck is this Guangling Emperor, he can still get the hardest scales on such a creature.

"Don't look at it, you can't do anything about this scale at the moment!" Ouyang Jiu'er shook his head, "If you want to refine this scale into a weapon, you can't do it without the strength of the domain ancestor." Otherwise, why do you think Emperor Guangling put it in the treasure house? And this thing can't be exposed yet, otherwise the Domain Ancestor will snatch it. Do you want it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian gritted his teeth and said.

Such good things are rare in the world, and if he doesn't want them, it will be difficult to get them again in the future.

Ye Tian chose this scale, while Ouyang Jiu'er took away several other heavy treasures.

Ye Tian took ninety percent of the remaining treasure resources, this is what Ouyang Jiu'er said.

After the distribution, Ye Tian calculated that his net worth had doubled, which showed how great the value of the treasure house of the Guangling Han Palace was.

"Be careful, it's best not to sell these treasures, otherwise your identity will be exposed, I estimate that Emperor Guangling will send an invincible true ancestor to besiege and kill you at all costs!" Ouyang Jiu'er reminded.

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't stay here, she left quickly, she was going to refine the root of the Forbidden Divine Tree, so as to break the shackles and be promoted to the Invincible True Ancestor.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, continued to retreat, striving to cultivate the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear to the Dacheng realm as soon as possible.

The other side.

Emperor Guangling couldn't find any trace of the enemy, and he couldn't personally enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to find people, and he also didn't dare to let a large number of True Ancestors enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Otherwise, the appearance of a large number of True Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace would cause no small trouble.

As a result, he only sent a few Invincible True Ancestors and a number of Supreme True Ancestors to secretly enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to find out the news.

As soon as the enemy's trail is identified, devastating revenge is carried out.

Time passes slowly.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian raised the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear to the Dacheng realm, and immediately broke the record of the strongest attack in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, shocking the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Strongest Attack Record, Strongest Defense Record, Strongest Speed Record.

These three records represent Ye Tian's ascension to the position of the first true ancestor of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and no one can shake it.

Of course, this does not mean that Ye Tian is invincible, because the main factors that affect the battle also include various hole cards and weapons.

If someone is armed with a very terrifying killing weapon, they can also threaten Ye Tian.

However, this is not very likely.

Because Ye Tian is too comprehensive, it is too difficult to kill Ye Tian.

Therefore, Ye Tian was recognized as the first true ancestor of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

"Seven Xuanxu Ancient Realm records, the cultivation speed of the increase is too terrifying, and this increase is a comprehensive increase. I'm afraid it won't be long before I can raise my cultivation to the realm of Great Dao Consummation. "

Ye Tian muttered.

The strength is increasing day by day, even Ye Tian doesn't know how powerful he is, although he has not stepped into the combat power of the Supreme True Ancestor, but he is definitely much stronger than the Invincible True Ancestor like the Blood Demon General.

The more terrifying Ye Tian's strength became, the other forces did not dare to come to him for trouble, so the Terran had a peaceful atmosphere, and the geniuses of the Terran could also cultivate with peace of mind.

Therefore, the human race ushered in a stable and beautiful prosperous era, and one genius after another rose rapidly, and the name of the country was false.

Not long after, a piece of good news came, Xiao Yue finally stepped into the ranks of the top true ancestors, which was also the second top true ancestor born by the human race so far.

But after becoming a top True Ancestor, it is more difficult to step into the Supreme True Ancestor again.

However, Xiao Yue has a Dao-level natal talent, as long as she concentrates on cultivating Dao Techniques, cultivating Dao Techniques to the Xiaocheng realm, it will not be too difficult to step into the Supreme True Ancestor.

But it's also boring to practice all the time, and Xiao Yue came to Ye Tian on this day.

"Husband, I want a baby!"

Xiao Yue said.

All this time, the two have not had children.

After all, the lifespan of the two of them is almost unlimited, and they usually practice in retreat for a long time, mainly to improve their cultivation, so they don't have this idea.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded in response.

Since Xiao Yue wants to have children, he naturally won't object.

Moreover, with the current strength of the two of them, once an heir is born, the talent and bloodline will inevitably be strong, and the future achievements will be very high, and they will definitely be the top geniuses in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

In the days that followed, the two began to work hard to create a child.

The higher the cultivation, the more difficult it is to give birth to an heir, which is also a very fair thing, otherwise wouldn't the balance of all rules be subverted?

In order to successfully give birth to an heir in the palace, Ye Tian and Xiao Yue swallowed many treasures that helped to give birth to an heir, and worked hard for millions of years in the accelerated environment of time.

Finally on this day, Xiao Yue successfully became pregnant, and it was a dragon and phoenix fetus.

But this pregnancy is a very long time, ordinary people can give birth to an heir when they are pregnant in October, but a true ancestor like Xiao Yue, the birth of a child is naturally not simple, so it will take a long time before it will be truly born.

During this period of time, Ye Tian did not cultivate anymore, but accompanied Xiao Yue.

In a flash, 100,000 years have passed.

Ye Tian's palace.

Xiao Yue was in production, and with Xiao Yue's true ancestor cultivation, she naturally didn't need the help of others, only Ye Tian was watching from the side.

Soon, the cries of two babies were heard.

Listening to the cries of the two babies and feeling the joy transmitted by the blood, Ye Tian felt the throbbing of life, and the whole person instantly entered a special understanding.

In the next moment, he had an epiphany, and realized the slightest trace of the way of life.

"Unexpectedly, I have never studied the way of supreme life, but now I have realized a trace of skin. "

Ye Tian said with a smile.

It can be said that these two little guys are undoubtedly Ye Tian's lucky stars!

--------------

A few days later.

"Yue'er, I suggest sending the children to live in the mortal world of an ordinary world, so that it is not easy to create an arrogant and domineering character. If it were around us, just the flattery and flattery of countless people would probably be able to make their character worse!" Ye Tian proposed.

Xiao Yue was a little reluctant, and said, "But if the children don't live with us, won't they become alienated from us?"

Ye Tian touched Xiao Yue's hair and said, "Yue'er, we are true ancestors, it's okay to just separate a wisp of consciousness incarnation to accompany them, as long as we don't act as real identities and only consider ourselves ordinary people, there will be no problem." "

"Hmm!"

Xiao Yue nodded and agreed with Ye Tian's decision.

The vast continent, a small principality.

Ye Tian and Xiao Yue came to a small city called Black Wolf City, rented a shop and a courtyard, and settled here with their two children.

And the strength of the two children was also sealed by Ye Tian, because these two children were born after 100,000 years of gestation, and they had the strength of almost a heavenly monarch as soon as they made a move.

How can such strength live in the mortal world?

Therefore, Ye Tian sealed their strength so that it would not affect their lives in the mortal world.

In the blink of an eye, eighteen years have passed.
